positive: A detailed, symmetrical cosmic botanical illustration featuring swirling nebulae forming the petals of oversized, stylized flora. The central composition is a blooming celestial mandala surrounded by delicate, interconnected star trails and iridescent cosmic dust. Style is a blend of neo-traditional tattoo flash and modern minimalist pop art, utilizing thick, clean outlines and strong black linework (line art aesthetic). The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, burnt orange, and accents of metallic gold, set against a crisp, off-white background. Emphasize a clean, vector-like quality with clear silhouettes and strong contrast, ensuring the design reads well when scaled for apparel printing. Highly detailed, graphic, symmetrical, central composition, studio lighting.
negative: blurry, sketch, photo, grain, noise, text, watermark, low detail, artifact, messy, ugly, logo, trademark, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, grayscale, hyper-realistic
